title: Physical Therapy Aide
description: The National Institutes of Health seeks Physical Therapy Aides to support patient care and rehabilitation services at our Phoenix facility. You'll assist physical therapists in implementing treatment plans, maintain equipment, and provide direct patient support. This onsite role offers meaningful work in a federal research and healthcare setting.
responsibilities: Assist physical therapists in patient treatment sessions, supporting exercises and rehabilitation activities
Prepare and maintain treatment rooms and equipment; ensure a safe, clean clinical environment
Document patient progress and treatment sessions in electronic medical records
Help patients with mobility and daily living activities as directed by supervising therapists
Maintain inventory of supplies and report equipment needs to supervisory staff
benefits: 12 days annual leave + 13 days sick leave
